case_title: TROY CHILCOTT VS. JOSEPH Y DABIT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHILCOTT, TROY AS TO DEFENDANT DABIT, JOSEPH Y AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CUP A JOE COFFEEHOUSE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHILCOTT, TROY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DABIT, JOSEPH Y AN INDIVIDUAL DBA CUP A JOE COFFEEHOUSE $2,242.50 PRINCIPAL, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,447.50, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
